title: Adult Spindle Cell Sarcoma
summary: Diagnostic pathway for deep-seated spindle cell neoplasms.

start.title: Adult Spindle Cell Sarcoma
start.description: Diagnostic approach to deep-seated spindle cell neoplasms.

step1.title: Pattern Recognition
step1.description: What is the dominant architectural pattern?

pleomorphic_branch.title: Go to Pleomorphic Algorithm
pleomorphic_branch.description: Switch to the dedicated Pleomorphic Sarcoma algorithm for high-grade lesions.

check_synovial.title: Synovial Sarcoma
check_synovial.description: Translocation associated. Classic biphasic or monophasic spindle cell patterns.
pitfalls: MPNST: Can be TLE1 positive! Check H3K27me3 loss.
Ewing Sarcoma: CD99 is positive in both. Check NKX2.2 and molecular.
SFT: Both can be CD99/BCL2 positive. Check STAT6.

title: Epithelioid Soft Tissue Tumors
summary: Distinguishing carcinoma mimics from true epithelioid sarcomas.

result_carcinoma.title: Consider Carcinoma
result_carcinoma.description: Metastatic Carcinoma is the most common epithelioid malignancy.

mesenchymal_branch.title: Mesenchymal Markers
mesenchymal_branch.description: Check vascular, myogenic, and specific markers.

result_melanoma.title: Melanoma
pearls: Always include S100/SOX10 in epithelioid panels

title: Myxoid Soft Tissue Tumors
summary: Using vascular patterns to navigate the differential.

start.title: Myxoid Soft Tissue Tumors
start.description: Differential of MFS, Myxoid LPS, LGFMS.

result_mfs.title: Myxofibrosarcoma
result_mfs.description: Infiltrative, pleomorphic cells floating in mucus.
pearls: Look for curvilinear vessels with perivascular tumor condensation

title: Small Round Blue Cell Tumors
summary: Urgent differentiation between Lymphoma, Ewing, and Rhabdo.

result_lymphoma.title: Lymphoma/Leukemia
result_lymphoma.description: Proceed to Hematopathology workup (TdT, CD20, CD3, etc.).

result_dsrct.title: DSRCT
result_dsrct.description: Polyphenotypic small round blue cell tumor.

result_lbl.title: Lymphoblastic Lymphoma
pearls: CD99 is NOT specific for Ewing!

result_other.title: Broad Differential
result_other.description: Consider CIC-sarcoma, BCOR-sarcoma, Neuroblastoma, or Poorly Differentiated Synovial Sarcoma. Molecular testing required.

specific_dx.title: Specific Sarcoma
specific_dx.description: Classify based on lineage (e.g., Pleomorphic LMS, Pleomorphic Rhabdo, Carcinoma).

result_ddlps.title: Dedifferentiated Liposarcoma
pearls: Retroperitoneum is DDLPS until proven otherwise

title: Bone Tumor Workup
summary: Diagnostic approach based on matrix production (Osteoid vs Chondroid).

start.title: Bone Tumor Workup
start.description: Primary triage by matrix production and radiology.

matrix_check.title: Dominant Matrix
matrix_check.description: Is the tumor producing osteoid or cartilage?

result_osteosarcoma.title: Osteosarcoma
result_osteosarcoma.description: Production of osteoid by malignant cells.

result_chondrosarcoma.title: Chondrosarcoma
pearls: Permeation of marrow fat is key

title: Lipomatous Tumors
summary: Distinguishing benign lipoma from atypical lipomatous tumors.

location_check.title: Anatomic Location
location_check.description: Location predicts behavior for atypical fatty tumors.

start.title: Cutaneous Spindle Cell Tumors
start.description: The "SLAM" differential: SCC, Leiomyosarcoma, AFX, Melanoma.

result_melanoma_spindle.title: Desmoplastic Melanoma
pearls: S100 usually positive, Melan-A often negative

result_afx.title: AFX / PDS
pearls: Must rule out Carcinoma and Melanoma first

result_pole.title: POLE Ultramutated
result_pole.prognosis: Excellent prognosis, even if high grade.

result_hgsc.title: High-Grade Serous
pearls: Originates from STIC in Fallopian Tube

start.title: Uterine Mesenchymal Tumors
start.description: Distinguishing smooth muscle from stromal tumors.

spindle_branch.title: Smooth Muscle Assessment
spindle_branch.description: Evaluate for atypia, necrosis, and mitoses.

result_leiomyoma.title: Leiomyoma / STUMP
pearls: If necrosis present without atypia = Leiomyoma with infarct

title: Vulvar Pathology
summary: Approach to squamous and glandular lesions.

start.title: Vaginal Mass Evaluation
start.description: Primary vs Metastatic vs Benign Mimics.

result_carcinoma.title: Carcinoma
result_carcinoma.description: Rule out extension from Cervix/Vulva (more common than primary).

start.title: Benign Mimics of GYN Malignancy
start.description: Approach to lesions that look scary but are benign.

title: Renal Cell Carcinoma
summary: Subtyping RCC based on cytoplasm and architecture.

title: Urothelial Neoplasms
summary: Grading and Staging of Bladder Tumors.
